/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mykernel_native.dir/link.d -shared  -o "/mnt/d/Documents/MainCodeProjects/MyKernel - JustIT/MyKernel - v0.1 Beta/src/mykernel/mykernel_native.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-musl.so" CMakeFiles/mykernel_native.dir/bindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mykernel_native.dir/crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mykernel_native.dir/isolation.cpp.o  /usr/lib/libcrypto.so
